name: select
visual_summary: A dropdown list component used to allow users to select one or more options. A developer would use the Select component when they want to display a list of options and allow the user to choose one or more of them. For example, in a settings form.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: select
Description: A dropdown list component used to allow users to select one or more options. A developer would use the Select component when they want to display a list of options and allow the user to choose one or more of them. For example, in a settings form.
Style: default, flat
Interactions: click, hover, expandable
Tags: dropdown, list, options

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
